title: Day Counter
description: Adds a playtime tracker to your singleplayer world, showing your total seconds, minutes, hours, and days played. Perfect for 1000‑Day Hardcore runs and long‑term worlds.
body:
🕒 Playtime Tracker

Playtime Tracker is a lightweight, client-side mod that records exactly how long you've played in each of your singleplayer worlds. It tracks your total seconds, minutes, hours, and days and displays them in a clean, readable format. No setup required — just install and start playing.

📸 Preview

![mod preview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a384047db7f25c1a148004179ad88e8a9b7b9eb0.png)

✨ What This Mod Does

  • Tracks your total playtime in real time.
  • Displays seconds, minutes, hours, and days played.
  • Works automatically in every singleplayer world.
  • Perfect for 1000‑Day Hardcore Challenges, long-term survival worlds, and progression tracking.
  • Minimal performance impact — optimized for smooth gameplay.

🎯 Why You’ll Love It

  • Great for documenting world progress.
  • Ideal for content creators who want accurate world statistics.
  • Helps track long-term survival achievements.
  • Zero configuration — plug and play.

🔧 Technical Information

  • Fully client-side — no server installation needed.
  • Compatible with most HUD, UI, and overlay mods.
  • Uses efficient tick-based tracking for precise time measurement.
  • Stores data per world to avoid mixing statistics between saves.
  • Designed for Fabric 1.21.1+.

🚀 Future Plans

  • Customizable display styles (compact, detailed, minimalist).
  • Configurable update intervals and formatting options.
  • Optional multiplayer leaderboard support.
  • Support for additional mod loaders (Forge, Quilt).

💬 Final Notes

This mod focuses on accuracy, simplicity, and seamless integration. Feedback is highly appreciated — your suggestions help shape future updates.
